title: paspalum fluitans
intro: Paspalum fluitans, also known as water couch grass, is a tropical grass species native to Australia, Asia, and the Pacific Islands. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antifungal compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. Research suggests that Paspalum fluitans may help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations due to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its health benefits.
